data.title: DOGE aims for $0.10 breakout with short-term target $0.095-$0.10 and medium-term forecast $0.085-$0.12. Bullish at $0.10.
data.description: Predictions for the price of DOGE indicate a short-term target of $0.095 to $0.10 within the next week. Looking ahead, the medium-term forecast for DOGE over the next month ranges between $0.085 and $0.12. A bullish breakout is expected at the $0.10 mark, while critical support for DOGE is anticipated to be at a different value.

data.title: Microgreens Market to Reach USD 3.34 Billion by 2031 with Vertical Farming Segment Projected to Grow at 19.74% CAGR, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent study by Mordor Intelligence revealed that the market for microgreens was valued at USD 3 billion in 2025. It is projected to increase to USD 5.71 billion by 2031, with an estimated growth rate of 11.32% CAGR. This marks a significant jump from the expected USD 3.34 billion in 2026.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin Surpasses RMB540 Million in Share Repurchases in 2026
data.description: On March 30, 2026, KANZHUN LIMITED, known as "BOSS Zhipin," disclosed that they have implemented their share repurchase initiative by utilizing approximately RMB34.5 million to repurchase 759,056 ordinary shares on March 27. In the current year of 2026, the Company has spent more than RMB540 million on share repurchases. This action highlights the Company's dedication to enhancing shareholder returns.

data.title: MBT Unveils Next‑Gen Sustainable Solutions at MCE 2026
data.description: During MCE 2026 in Milan on March 30, 2026, Midea Building Technologies (MBT) stood out by presenting three significant innovations. These included the V9 VRF system, a range of R290 heat pumps, and solutions for cooling data centers. MBT's showcase emphasized its expertise in eco-friendly refrigerants, showcasing its leadership in this area.

data.title: Nidec Announces the Receipt of a Request by a Shareholder to File an Action
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, it was reported that on March 27, 2026, a written request was received from a single shareholder of the company, urging for legal action under Article 847, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act. The request, known as the "Request for Filing an Action," calls for the company to take measures to pursue liability and other remedies against current actions.

data.title: Hikvision introduces LinkVu: An integrated IoT & networking solution for SMB installers
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on March 30, 2026, Hikvision, a prominent AIoT solution provider, introduced LinkVu. This comprehensive visual solution is tailored to enhance the capabilities of IoT and networking project installers in catering to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). LinkVu presents a wide range of features and tools to support these installers, aimed at maximizing their efficiency and effectiveness in serving SMBs.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic – Transactions in Connection with Share Buy-Back Program
data.description: Danish company Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) has revealed details of its share buy-back program initiated on March 12, 2026. The company plans to repurchase shares worth up to DKK 200 million between March 12 and May 13, 2026. This initiative complies with Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052, known as the Safe Harbour Regulation, relating to market abuse prevention.

data.title: Beijing Review: Prosperity on the Plateau
data.description: On March 28, 1959, the people of Xizang, under the leadership of the Communist Party of China (CPC), initiated their democratic reform, putting an end to centuries of feudal serfdom. This led to the liberation of one million individuals from servitude. The historic event marked a significant turning point in the region's history.

data.title: Solana's price hovers at $84.32, RSI at 44.81. Analysts foresee potential $88 resistance in two weeks amid mixed signals.
data.description: Solana is currently priced at $84.32, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 44.81. According to technical analysis, there is a possibility that SOL may reach a resistance level of $88 in the next two weeks. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution.

data.title: UPM strengthens presence in India with a new Adhesive Materials terminal near New Delhi
data.description: Helsinki - On March 30, 2026, UPM Adhesive Materials, a leading provider of cutting-edge self-adhesive label materials worldwide, announced plans to increase its presence in India by establishing a new slitting and distribution facility close to New Delhi. This investment aims to boost UPM Adhesive Materials' operations and improve service in the region.
